result.reason: To enable users to display multiple remote connections or other interactive content simultaneously within a single configurable UI panel, improving workflow efficiency.
result.approach: Investigate the feasibility of nesting WeifenLuo.WinFormsUI.Docking.DockPanel instances or creating a custom DockContent implementation that can host multiple connection views side-by-side or in a split-pane layout. This would involve modifying how connections are opened and displayed, as well as updating the layout serialization/deserialization logic.
